query: From earth, I approach a new planet and wish to send a short 2-word greeting to the new orb.
expected_intent: friendly first-contact greeting to a new world

query: Greet developers that wrote their very first program.
Announce to the whole office that free pizza has arrived in the kitchen.
Tell a departing colleague farewell in the warmest, shortest way possible.
expected_intent: warm goodbye to a leaving teammate

query: Warn hikers on a trail that a storm is approaching fast.
Congratulate a sports team that just won the championship.
Invite neighbors to a quiet evening book club.
Thank volunteers who cleaned up the community park.
